From Borgaon to IPL Stardom: Mangesh Yadav's Journey to RCB for Rs 5.2 Crore

Dec 23, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

From Borgaon to IPL Stardom: Mangesh Yadav’s Journey to RCB for Rs 5.2 Crore

The 2026 IPL auction in Abu Dhabi turned out to be a life-changing moment for Mangesh Yadav, a left-arm pacer from Borgaon, Madhya Pradesh. The young cricketer’s name flashed on the screen, sparking a fierce bidding war between Royal Challengers Bangalore (RCB) and Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH).

Within seconds, Mangesh’s price soared from a modest base price of Rs 30 lakh to an astonishing Rs 5.2 crore, a surreal moment for the player who could barely process the scale of the event. The bidding war reached its peak, and RCB emerged as the victor, securing Yadav’s services for the upcoming IPL season.

This dramatic rise from a small village in Madhya Pradesh to a coveted IPL contract is a testament to Mangesh’s raw talent, hard work, and determination to succeed on the big stage.

👉 From Borgaon to IPL Stardom: Mangesh Yadav’s Journey to RCB for Rs 5.2 Crore
